creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:

===== env: DEVELOPER_MODE=yes DEVELOPER=1 STRICT_DEPENDS=yes USER=root UID=0 GID=0

Can't create cargo-crates/libc-0.2.65/src/unix/bsd/freebsdlike/freebsd/mod.rs.rej, output is in /tmp/patchrR4bvMXG1m4: No such file or directory
===>  FAILED Applying FreeBSD patch-powerpc
